package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for repository_constructor_accepts_gin_engine_or_router: Repository constructors that take transport objects.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule125NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule125NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule125NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario125Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule125NegativeService, input Rule125NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
